title: Helium
description: A lightweight modpack to improve performance and build upon the Minecraft experience.
body:
Helium includes a handful of mods to help your Minecraft experience. you can invite players to your singleplayer worlds with Essential, performance improvements, realistic animations with the Fresh Animations resource pack, a fresh UI with Pitch, and more!

![Comparison of vanilla Minecraft versus Helium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59bdc23fff229701e55f696f27ecb9df7598e630_0.webp)

(if there are any issues please email me at throws-fusible.0i@icloud.com)
